application.name: 微直播
application.ability: 现场图文直播，可用于现场活动、线下体验的直播报道。内容直观丰富的展现给粉丝了解。
application.description: 现场图文直播，可用于现场活动、线下体验的直播报道。内容直观丰富的展现给粉丝了解。
application.author: 微赞

manifest.install: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_jer_live` ( `id` mediumint(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `rid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT '0', `name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `thumb` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `description` varchar(400) DEFAULT NULL, `view` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `message_add_status` tinyint(2) DEFAULT '0', `comment_add_status` tinyint(2) DEFAULT '0', `sort` int(10) DEFAULT '0', `live_share_title` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `live_share_desc` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `live_share_img` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `live_type` tinyint(2) DEFAULT NULL, `live_charge` tinyint(2) DEFAULT NULL, `live_charge_price` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, `live_video` text, `live_tab` text, `live_marquee_status` tinyint(2) DEFAULT NULL, `live_marquee_content` text, `live_top_ad_img` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `live_top_ad_img_link` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `createtime` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `starttime` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, `status` tinyint(2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_jer_live_attachment` ( `id` mediumint(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `mid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `type` tinyint(2) DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0:image;1:video', `url` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `createtime` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_jer_live_ban` ( `id` mediumint(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `lid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `uid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_jer_live_charge_log` ( `id` mediumint(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `out_trade_no` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `lid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `uid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `fee` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL, `status` tinyint(2) DEFAULT NULL, `createtime` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_jer_live_comment` ( `id` mediumint(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `lid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `mid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `uid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `reuid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT '0', `content` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `status` tinyint(2) DEFAULT NULL, `createtime` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_jer_live_message` ( `id` mediumint(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `lid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `uid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `title` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `zan_count` smallint(10) unsigned DEFAULT '0', `comment_count` smallint(10) unsigned DEFAULT '0', `status` tinyint(2) DEFAULT NULL, `createtime` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_jer_live_presenter` ( `id` mediumint(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `lid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `uid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_jer_live_reward_log` ( `id` mediumint(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `out_trade_no` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `lid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `uid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `fee` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL, `status` tinyint(2) DEFAULT NULL, `createtime` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_jer_live_zan` ( `id` mediumint(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `lid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `mid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `uid` mediumint(10) DEFAULT NULL, `createtime` int(10) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
